text: After losing his job and his apartment in the same week, Tom felt like he was really at the end of his rope.
target_expression: at the end of his rope

text: The mountain climber was literally at the end of his rope, dangling fifty feet above the rocky ledge below.
target_expression: at the end of his rope

text: The politician tried to break the ice at the beginning of the town hall meeting with a humorous anecdote about his childhood.
The ship's crew had to break the ice that had formed around the hull overnight before they could navigate through the frozen harbor.
Ela estava com a pulga atras da orelha desde que viu o marido sair escondido de madrugada.
The new evidence shed light on the mysterious disappearance that had puzzled investigators for over a decade.
The lamp shed light on the dusty pages of the ancient manuscript lying open on the scholar's desk.
Ele engoliu sapos durante toda a reuniao enquanto o chefe criticava seu trabalho na frente dos colegas.
The company decided to pull the plug on the failing project after three consecutive quarters of losses and no signs of recovery.
The nurse carefully pulled the plug from the wall socket to disconnect the monitoring equipment before moving the patient to the new room.
